title: Systematically record base configurations before expanding nested upgrade options
note: When comparing product prices on highly customizable e-commerce sites like Apple, document the starting prices of each base size and model first. Avoid prematurely clicking into nested customization drawers (such as memory or storage upgrades) which split the view and cause excessive scrolling. Switch cleanly between top-level model tabs to gather baseline pricing before analyzing individual upgrade costs.
